name: Castle of Tickling
description:
TW: Kink content, leans towards noncon or cnc content.

A maniacal magic user, completely obsessed with tickling, has created a genius loci in the form of a castle - filled with all kinds of tickle traps, as well as creatures and people who are similarly obsessed with tickle torture. Rumors of treasure inside have spread, and attracted many challengers to this fetish-focused fort. Art thou ticklish?

A different flavor of tickle dungeon while still being fantasy. I'm trying out the "less is more" style of bot design, minimal tokens for maximal RP space.

Disclaimer: I cannot guarantee that the bot will not RP for the user, or that it won't forget your pronouns or preferences or whatever. That's an issue with the LLM.
creator: HornyDragonRhys
